query:
INSERT INTO outbox_events
                (event_id, kind, aggregate_type, aggregate_id,
                 payload, metadata, callbacks,
                 actor_id, correlation_id, causation_id)
            SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
                $1::uuid[], $2::text[], $3::text[], $4::uuid[],
                $5::jsonb[], $6::jsonb[], $7::jsonb[],
                $8::uuid[], $9::uuid[], $10::uuid[]
            )
